title: Lactalis Australia Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Lactalis Australia Pty Ltd paid $59,400 in penalties, reported in early July 2026, after the ACCC issued three infringement notices alleging false or misleading representations under the Australian Consumer Law: its Golden North 'Country Fresh' 2L milk and Ferguson Valley 'WA DAIRY FRESH' 2L milk were labelled as 'fresh' despite containing substantial reconstituted skim milk and lactose. The company has since removed the 'fresh' claim from the affected labels.
scope: Paid $59,400 over three ACCC infringement notices for alleged misleading 'fresh' product labelling; Removed the disputed labelling claim following the ACCC's concerns
